text:
Ruler's Invitation 支配者からの招待 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

|

|align=center colspan="3"|A letter which extends a warm invitation to visit the game's capital city, Limeiro. A visit to this city's castle is also included.

|

Summary

Ruler's Invitation 支配者からの招待 - A warm invitation to visit the game's capital city, Limeiro is enclosed within this letter. This invite is also extended to visit the Gamer Master's Castle which resides within it.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.110 :: 支配者からの招待 
この島の支配者からの招待状。城の場所を示した地図とバッジが同封されており、それを持つ者のみが入城が許される。
|-
![Eng]
|No.110 :: Ruler's Invitation 
Invitation from the ruler of the island. Badge and Map showing the castle's location is enclosed. Only the barer of this badge can enter it.
|}

Trivia

Gon is the first player of Greed Island to receive this card.
This card is taken to the player in an envelope carried by an owl, in a similar manner to the Hogwarts acceptance letter from the Harry Potter book and film series.
